non_blocking_improvements.description: Consider using more descriptive variable names.
Add docstrings to explain the purpose of each method.
non_blocking_improvements.suggestion: Include a brief description of the method's functionality, parameters, and return value.

tests_generated.test_code:
def test_student_creation():
    student = Student("Alice", 20, [15, 18, 12])
    assert student.name == "Alice"
    assert student.age == 20
    assert student.grades == [15, 18, 12]

def test_add_grade_valid():
    student = Student("David", 23, [12, 15])
    assert student.add_grade(18)
    assert student.grades == [12, 15, 18]

def test_add_grade_invalid():
    student = Student("Eve", 24, [10, 16])
    assert not student.add_grade(25)
    assert student.grades == [10, 16]
